section.title: Version 1
section.para: Implemented February 24, 2019 with an effective date of June 1, 2019.

section.title: Version 2
section.para: Implemented Janury 26, 2022 with an effective date of May 1, 2022.
Version 2 is the current live version of the Framework.
See Appendix G for information on the development of version 2 and the changes that were made.
See Appendix H for information on the ringing community consultation that took place prior to the implementation of version 2.
